name: UFP INDUSTRIES INC
summary: UFP Industries, Inc. is a holding company headquartered in Grand Rapids, Michigan, with subsidiaries in the U.S., Mexico, Canada, Spain, India, and Australia. It designs, manufactures, and supplies products made from wood, wood and non-wood composites, and other materials across three segments: Retail Solutions (pressure-treated lumber, composite decking, siding), Packaging (structural packaging, pallets, protective packaging), and Construction (factory-built housing, site-built, commercial, concrete forming).

products.name: ProWood
products.description: Pressure-treated and fire-retardant lumber products including decking, fencing, lattice, and lawn and garden products.

products.name: Outdoor Essentials
products.description: Branded line of wood and vinyl fencing, lattice, garden beds, planters, pergolas, and landscaping products.

products.name: Deckorators
products.description: Wood plastic composite and patented Surestone mineral-based composite decking, aluminum railing systems, balusters, and aluminum fencing.

products.name: UFP Edge
products.description: Exterior siding, pattern, trim, fascia, engineered wood siding, primed trim boards, shiplap, and project boards.

products.name: Structural Packaging
products.description: Custom-designed wood and metal packaging products engineered and manufactured for specific customer needs.

products.name: PalletOne
products.description: Wood and heat-treated wood pallets in numerous sizes and configurations, plus used pallet recycling operations.

products.name: Protective Packaging Solutions
products.description: Corrugate, foam, labels, strapping, and films sold as complementary packaging and shipping solutions.

products.name: Factory-Built Housing components
products.description: Roof trusses, cut-to-size dimensional lumber, and other components for factory-built housing manufacturers.

partnerships.description: UFP owns 50% of Dempsey, which produces pallet lumber and industrial wood products in Orangeburg, South Carolina, supplying critical fiber for pallet operations.
